title: So about the Evangelion 30 soundtrack
wikitext:
[]: So about the Evangelion 3.0 soundtrack...             Quote Post by UnknownEva2015 » Tue Oct 01, 2013 8:10 pm Hey guys, got a question or two I'm hoping you guys can answer for me. I recently bought the Evangelion 1.0 and 2.0 soundtracks (which I'm very pleased with). I'm now eyeing the 3.0 soundtrack and noticed a few things. There is the stand alone "Music from" version and then there is "Soundtrack" that comes with the movie. So now I'm wondering if I want all the music from the movie do I need to get both or is there some plan to release a soundtrack that has all of this? Thanks in advance.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 01, 2013 10:04 pm Hope somebody will correct me if I'm wrong, but: For 3.0, Music From are the tracks used in the film itself. Original SoundTrack includes some full versions or unused tracks. 1.0 had a CD for each while 2.0 included both CDs in one release. It seems like 1.0 and 2.0's Music From and Original SoundTrack were the reverse of 3.0?? The Japanese BD/DVD release of 3.33 included a first press OST of movie-edit tracks, including Sakura Nagashi (ED by Hikaru Utada) which is available on iTunes and other sites.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 01, 2013 10:47 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hope somebody will correct me if I'm wrong, but: For 3.0, Music From are the tracks used in the film itself. Original SoundTrack includes some full versions or unused tracks.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue Oct 01, 2013 11:26 pm So while looking at the back of my copy of the 3.0 CD, let me see if I got this straight. Disc I is the music cut to the scenes in the movie (which is the same tracks as the CD that came out with the Japanese edition of 3.33) while disc II contains the unused and extended tracks. Did I miss anything?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 02, 2013 6:17 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: You got that backwards.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Oct 02, 2013 6:41 pm I'm confused. My two-disk set "Music from Evangelion: 3.0" has both disks labelled the same (except "Disk1" and "Disk2" of course). Neither disk corresponds in any way with the CD that came with the Japanese 3.33. Although essentially the same tracks are present (in different order), the disk with the DVD has shorter versions than those in the two-disk set.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Oct 02, 2013 11:18 pm With what I was stating in my previous post and with what SSD and pwhodges said in their respective posts, I have to believe that the soundtrack "Shrio Sagisu Music from Evangelion 3.0," which is what pwhodges and I have is different in terms of order and length than the soundtrack CDs that came with the Japanese BD of 3.33 that SSD & FreakyFilmFan4ever have. I guess some of us will have to list somewhere the track order and length for each disc from their respective albums.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Oct 03, 2013 1:35 am cyharding wrote: "Shrio Sagisu Music from Evangelion 3.0," which is what pwhodges and I have is different in terms of order and length than the soundtrack CDs that came with the Japanese BD of 3.33 that SSD & FreakyFilmFan4ever have.
